summary: Phase 7.5 Pipeline Cockpit end-to-end verified. Backend: 10/10 pytest cases passing (funnel/cards/brief/drill-in/RBAC/error-handling). Frontend: cockpit at /admin/cockpit loads with 121 active records, all 6 funnel chips + All chip render live counts (Leads 21, Assessments 3, PA 83, Proposals 5, Cases 9, Closed 0), funnel filter chips correctly filter (21 lead cards, 0 non-lead leakage), drill-in drawer opens with all 7 lifecycle steps + Open Full View + WhatsApp buttons, Cmd-K modal (Ctrl+K) opens with Quick Actions list and live filter, AI Co-Pilot sidebar renders 3 live insights from /api/cockpit/brief (21 leads not contacted in 48h, 5 proposals awaiting decision, 3 KB items awaiting verification), + New Client button works, Refresh button works. ZERO blue/indigo color violations detected programmatically across the entire cockpit DOM subtree (LEAMSS brand rule respected).
action_items: Minor: console emits 'SSE connection error Event' on page load (non-blocking, likely a stale eventsource elsewhere in the app). Not cockpit-specific.

Observation during regression: when navigating directly to /sales/assessments, /admin/pre-assessments and /admin/verification-hub at the end of the test run, the app rendered the Login landing page. /admin and /admin/cockpit loaded correctly for the same admin session, so this is likely a route-guard / session-state edge in those specific routes and is unrelated to Phase 7.5 cockpit work — flag for sanity check next iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: Cockpit.jsx is ~810 lines but well-structured into subcomponents (FunnelChip, FilterButton, PipelineCard) — acceptable, no split needed yet.

30s polling re-runs fetchCards which depends on activeStage/search/ownerFilter/sortMode — the dependency array correctly captures these via useCallback, but every filter change cancels nothing in flight; consider AbortController for race-safety on slow networks.
cockpit.py funnel endpoint iterates pre_assessments cursor in Python instead of using a single $facet aggregation — fine for 100s of records, will need optimization at ~10k records.
Brief endpoint hardcodes the stale_cutoff at 48h; consider making it a constant or env var.
All token reads use localStorage.getItem('token') consistently — matches the stored key (NOT 'auth_token').
test_credentials: admin@leamss.com / Admin@123 (verified working), partner@leamss.com / Partner@123 (verified working via backend RBAC test)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing seeded data (21 leads + 3 assessments + 97 PAs aggregating to 121 active records).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 7.5 Cockpit fully green. Production page is /admin/cockpit (NOT /admin/cockpit-mockup which is the deprecated blue/indigo mockup). Token key in localStorage is 'token'. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_iteration132_phase_75_cockpit.py. Sanity-check the regression observation on /sales/assessments and /admin/pre-assessments routes — they redirected to login during regression sweep even though /admin worked for the same admin token; could be a permission-guard quirk worth investigating separately.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in Phase 7.5 cockpit scope.
